## We Say

Q2M Leather Cleaner Natural is Gyeons latest mild leather cleanser suitable for all types of modern automotive leather including delicate nappa and semi-aniline upholstery.
Whilst it doesn't pack as much "punch" as the Q2M Leather Cleaner Strong, it is more versatile, being able to be used on all types of modern leather, so would make for a perfect regular use cleanser.

## Key Features

Agitation Required

Yes

(See how to use)

Cleaning Strength

*5*/10

(Compared to others)

Dilutable

No

(Ready to use)

## Description

**Gyeon Q2M Leather Set Natural** is the complete solution for keeping on top of your leather. Combining Q2M Leather Cleaner Natural with Q2 Leather Coat Redefined, making this kit perfect for cleaning, protecting, and maintaining your leather.

Everything you need is in this set, as well as the cleaner and protector mentioned above, you get the Q2M Scrub Pad EVO to give the leather surfaces a deep clean, the Q2M MF Applicator for applying the Leather Coat and microfibre towel to wipe it all down.

Q2M Leather Cleaner Natural gently removes light dirt, oily residues and provides the best preparation for coating. It contains no softening additives and does not leave any residue that could potentially interfere with coatings. It leaves a natural looks, matte finish and is suitable for all types of modern leather. Gyeon Q2 Leather Coat ensures a long-lasting protective effect and makes future maintenance easier.

## Specification

## How To Use

Ensure the leather is clear and free of loose debris before cleaning. Apply a small amount of Q2M Leather Cleaner Natural onto the Q2M Scrub Pad and proceed to gently clean the leather, working on a small area at a time. Once worked in, wipe away residue with a clean microfibre towel. Once all leather is clean, proceed to protect with Q2 Leather Coat. Spray Leather Coat onto the supplied microfibre applicator and work into the leather, ensuring an even coverage. Let it dry for 15 minutes and then check the finish. If needed repeat the application. Allow a few hours before driving the vehicle.
